impact: Clicking a link element (e.g. optout_link.first.click()) navigates the browser without passing through BrowserSession.navigate(). The destination host is never checked against the allowlist. The safety property "all navigation via BrowserSession" does not hold for link-based navigation. Fix: register a page.route() handler in BrowserSession that blocks requests to non-allowlist hosts.
title: Link clicks in adapters bypass BrowserSession URL allowlist
